name: spl_expert
description: SPL query expertise skill for generating, optimizing, explaining, and analyzing Splunk Search Processing Language queries.
author: ObsAI Team

splunk_host.description: Splunk host for REST API validation

max_query_length.description: Maximum SPL query length to process

actions.name: generate_spl
actions.description: Generate an SPL query from a natural language description. Uses template-based generation and NLP-to-SPL translation to produce correct, optimized queries.

description.description: Natural language description of the desired search

actions.name: optimize_query
actions.description: Optimize an existing SPL query for better performance. Analyzes command ordering, suggests tstats conversion, detects expensive operations, and returns an improved version.

actions.name: explain_query
actions.description: Explain what an SPL query does in plain English. Breaks down each pipeline stage, identifies the data flow, and describes the output format.

actions.name: detect_anti_patterns
actions.description: Detect performance anti-patterns in an SPL query. Checks for issues like wildcard index usage, unnecessary subsearches, inefficient command ordering, and resource-intensive operations.

query.description: The SPL query to check for anti-patterns
